DataRequest.Name: Failed VPN Logon From Outside My Country / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects VPN logon from outside my country. My Country is set to "United States" and may need to be changed for outside United States deployments
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Failed VPN login from $user at IP $srcIpAddr from outside my country

SubPattern.name: VPNLoginOutside
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: (eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_VPNLogonFailure) OR (eventType="Checkpoint-Log-Log In" AND appName="Endpoint Security VPN")) AND srcGeoCountry NOT IN (Group@PH_COUNTRY_GROUP_MYHOME)
